title: neocodon wolgensis
intro: Neocodon wolgensis, also known as Siberian bugloss, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to Siberia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Neocodon wolgensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
